backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Jeevan HealthCare backend, defining data types (UserProfile, Booking, Service, etc.) and exposing shared functions for user management, bookings, services, Stripe payments, and access-controlled admin operations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming the creation of a static DatabaseSchemaPage.tsx that displays 10 core database tables as hardcoded JSX cards in a responsive grid with Medical Blue Tailwind styling.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering pages, components, hooks, and configuration files for the Jeevan HealthCare React application.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.) used throughout the application.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Jeevan HealthCare frontend SPA, mounting the React app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router configuration that defines all application routes (public, admin, phlebotomist, doctor) and wraps the app with QueryClient, ThemeProvider, and Toaster providers.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLayou: Provides the admin panel shell with a sidebar navigation and access control, redirecting unauthenticated or unauthorized users and rendering child routes via Outlet.
frontend/src/components/AppointmentRemin: React component that schedules and displays appointment reminder toasts at 24-hour, 3-hour, and 1-hour intervals before an appointment, and conditionally shows a Join Video Call button 15 minutes before online consultations.
frontend/src/components/doctor/DoctorLay: Provides the doctor portal shell with sidebar navigation and role-based access control, showing an access-denied card for users without the doctor role.
frontend/src/components/DoctorCard.tsx: Renders a doctor listing card with avatar, star rating, consultation mode badges, availability indicator, and a 'Book Now' button using MockDoctor data.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand logo, quick navigation links, service links, and contact details including phone, email, and social media icons.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky site header with logo, desktop/mobile navigation, cart badge, and Internet Identity-based auth with role-based dashboard routing.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps pages with Header, Footer, and conditionally shows a ProfileSetupModal for authenticated users without a profile.
frontend/src/components/phlebotomist/Phl: Provides the phlebotomist portal shell with a sidebar and access control, redirecting users who lack the phlebotomist role back to the home page.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog with a react-hook-form form that collects name, email, and phone to create a new patient UserProfile on the backend.
frontend/src/components/SlotCalendar.tsx: Interactive monthly calendar component for selecting appointment dates, disabling past dates and supporting month navigation.
frontend/src/components/SlotLockTimer.ts: Displays a countdown timer showing how long a selected appointment slot is held, with urgent styling when under 60 seconds remain.
frontend/src/components/SpecialtyAccordi: Renders an accordion UI listing 16 medical specialty categories (e.g., Primary Care, Cardiology) with their specialists. Clicking a specialist triggers an optional callback or navigates to a search route.
frontend/src/components/TimeSlotGrid.tsx: Displays a grid of 30-minute appointment time slots from 9 AM to 7 PM, with states for unavailable, locked, selected, and available slots based on the selected date.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, initializing admin access control if a token is present, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCart.ts: Zustand store with localStorage persistence managing a shopping cart of lab tests and packages, exposing add, remove, clear, and price-calculation actions.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and status flags. Includes an `InternetIdentityProvider` component that persists identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for interacting with the backend actor, covering services, user profiles, admin/role checks, bookings, doctor data, and more. Each hook uses `useActor` to obtain the actor and enables queries only when the actor is ready.
frontend/src/hooks/useSlotLock.ts: Custom hook that manages a 5-minute countdown lock on a selected time slot, providing `lockSlot`, `clearLock`, `lockedSlot`, and `remainingSeconds` state. Uses an interval ref to count down and auto-clears the lock on expiry or unmount.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind CSS layers and defines CSS custom properties for the Jeevan brand color palette in both light and dark modes. Also registers utility classes for brand-specific text, background, and border colors.
frontend/src/lib/mockDoctors.ts: Exports a `MOCK_DOCTORS` array of static doctor objects with fields like specialty, experience, rating, consultation fee, and availability, used as shared mock data across doctor-related pages. Also defines the `MockDoctor` TypeScript interface.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app into the DOM, wrapping it with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider`. Imports global styles and mounts the root `App` component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static About page component displaying Jeevan HealthCare's mission, vision, story, and core values using cards and icons. Structured into multiple sections with hero, mission/vision grid, story narrative, and a values grid.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminCRMPage.ts: An admin CRM page for managing sales leads with a table view, status filtering/search, and dialogs for adding or editing lead details including follow-up notes and assignee.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminCustomersP: An admin page for managing customers that fetches all customers from the backend, supports search, and provides dialogs for adding, viewing details (with associated patients), and deactivating customers.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminDashboardP: An admin dashboard overview page that fetches and displays key operational metrics (total/active/completed orders, users, phlebotomists, pending reports) as stat cards.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminOrdersPage: An admin orders page that fetches and lists all customer bookings, displaying address, service description, preferred date, urgency badge, and budget for each order.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminPatientsPa: An admin page for managing patients that supports searching, adding new patients linked to customers, viewing patient details with vitals, and deleting patients via backend mutations.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminReportsPag: Admin page for managing test reports, displaying mock data with verified/pending status badges and options to view or verify each report.
Admin page that fetches and displays all diagnostic services/packages in a card grid, showing name, category, and active status using the useAllServices hook.
Admin page that lists all system users fetched via useListAllUsers, displaying each user's name, email, role (with icon), and active status in cards.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminVitalsPage: Admin page for managing patient vitals with search/filter, a table view, and a dialog to add new vitals using CRUD mutation hooks with toast notifications.
frontend/src/pages/BookingConfirmationPa: Displays a booking confirmation summary after a successful appointment booking, including doctor info, date/time, fee, and action buttons for starting online consultation, tracking home visits, or post-consultation actions.
frontend/src/pages/BookingPage.tsx: Multi-step lab test booking form that collects patient details, address, time slot, and payment method, then submits the booking and clears the cart on success.
frontend/src/pages/BookSlotPage.tsx: Page for selecting an appointment date and time slot for a specific doctor, with slot locking and a timer. On confirmation, navigates to the patient details page with booking parameters as query params.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Displays the user's lab test/package cart with item details, pricing, savings, and options to remove items or proceed to booking.
Allows the user to select a consultation type (online, clinic, or home visit) for a doctor, calculates the total fee with applicable discounts and travel fees, then navigates to the slot booking page.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Displays the Jeevan HealthCare contact page with phone, WhatsApp, email, address, hours, social media links, and an embedded Google Map.
frontend/src/pages/DatabaseSchemaPage.ts: Renders a visual reference page showing the database schema tables (Users, and others) with column names and data types for the Jeevan HealthCare platform.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorAnalytic: Doctor analytics page displaying performance metrics (completed consultations, rating, total patients, success rate) fetched via useDoctorDashboardStats with skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorAppointm: Doctor appointments page with day/week/month view toggle, listing appointments fetched via useDoctorAppointments with actions to accept, cancel, or complete each appointment.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorConsulta: Renders the doctor's teleconsultation interface with video/audio/chat controls and a tabbed SOAP notes form for documenting patient consultations.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorDashboar: Displays the doctor's personalized dashboard with quick stats (appointments, prescriptions, earnings, rating) fetched via React Query hooks, with loading skeletons and error handling.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorEarnings: Shows the doctor's earnings summary (total, pending, monthly) and a detailed earnings list fetched via React Query, with export functionality and loading/error states.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorHelpPage: Provides a help and support page for doctors with quick-link cards for training, compliance, and support tickets, plus an FAQ accordion section.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorPatients: Displays a searchable list of the doctor's patients with details like name, gender, blood group, and relationship, fetched via React Query with loading skeletons and error handling.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorProfileP: Doctor profile settings page with four tabs (Profile, Qualifications, Availability, Settings) allowing doctors to update personal info, education, schedule, and notification preferences.
frontend/src/pages/DoctorConsultationPag: Doctor consultation listing page with search, specialty accordion filter, sort options (rating, fee, experience, availability), and navigation to individual doctor profiles or booking.
frontend/src/pages/DoctorListingPage.tsx: Displays a filtered list of doctors by URL specialty param with search and sort controls, falling back to all doctors if no specialty match is found.
frontend/src/pages/HealthPage.tsx: Interactive health tools page featuring a symptom checker that analyzes selected symptoms and returns a severity-rated condition recommendation, alongside vital readings display.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: The main landing page displaying quick service shortcuts, health packages (fetched via API), and a 'Why Choose Us' section with tabs and FAQ-style toggles.
frontend/src/pages/HomeVisitTrackingPage: A real-time home visit tracking page that animates a doctor's map position, counts down ETA, and provides in-page chat and call modal functionality.
frontend/src/pages/OnlineConsultationPag: A simulated video consultation page with mute/camera controls, in-session chat with mock doctor replies, file uploads, and a prescription builder with preview.
frontend/src/pages/OrdersPage.tsx: Lists mock lab test orders with status badges and allows filtering by all/active/completed tabs, with navigation to individual order tracking.
frontend/src/pages/OrderTrackingPage.tsx: Displays a static timeline of lab order statuses (from booking to report ready) for a given order ID, using check/circle icons to indicate completion.
frontend/src/pages/PatientDetailsPage.ts: A multi-field form page for collecting patient details (type, demographics, symptoms, file uploads) before proceeding to payment for a doctor consultation booking.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentPage.tsx: Payment page that displays a fee breakdown (consultation, travel, GST, discounts) and lets users select a payment method (UPI, card, net banking, wallet, or pay-at-home) before confirming a booking and navigating to a confirmation page.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/Phleboto: Displays a phlebotomist's assigned sample collections for the day, showing patient name, address, scheduled time, test names, status badge, and a Google Maps navigation button.
Phlebotomist dashboard showing four summary metric cards (total, completed, in-progress, and pending collections) derived from the useSampleCollections hook.
Post-consultation page shown after a booking is complete, offering action cards for downloading a prescription, ordering medicines, booking lab tests, scheduling a follow-up, and rating the doctor.
frontend/src/pages/PublicDoctorProfilePa: Public doctor profile page that displays a doctor's details (photo, ratings, specialization, consultation modes, availability) fetched by ID, with a button to proceed to booking.
frontend/src/pages/RatingReviewPage.tsx: Rating and review page where patients can submit a star rating, written review, and recommendation for a doctor after a consultation, with a success state on submission.
frontend/src/pages/ReportsPage.tsx: Reports page that lists mock verified lab test reports with order details and provides a button to download each report as a PDF.
frontend/src/pages/ServicePage.tsx: Dynamic service detail page that renders content (title, intro, included services, target audience, benefits, and an image) for a given service slug such as doctor-consultation, medicine-delivery, or lab-tests.
frontend/src/pages/TestsPage.tsx: A diagnostic tests catalog page that displays a searchable/filterable list of lab tests, supports adding tests to a cart, and allows prescription upload via a dialog, with profile setup gating for authenticated users.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read, store, retrieve, and clear URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom Jeevan brand colors (oklch variables), typography, border radius, box shadows, font families, and accordion animations.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot (version 39) describing the Jeevan HealthCare app's full architecture, feature list, tech stack, known issues, and completed feature history for build planning continuity.
